search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted results to lastzwiki.com only. Prioritized concrete guide pages over generic home pages. No public-claim-ready marking used.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Main hero hub with character listings, levels, and equipment sections; useful for hero discovery and build cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster, stat context, and equipment links.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page with badge costs and category structure; useful for research discovery and cost cross-validation leads.
results.primary_user_job: Look up research categories and badge cost tables.

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English home hub linking to heroes, research, buildings, alliances, and guide sections; good for navigating to deeper pages.
results.primary_user_job: Navigate to related guide and wiki sections.

search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost

search_records.no_results_reason: No results returned from the allowed domain for the provided search terms.

search_records.search_notes: Search restricted to the approved source domain returned no indexed matches for this query.
search_records.no_results_reason: No results found on the allowed domain for the submitted query within the current search index.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to lastz.fandom.com. Results favored concrete wiki pages tied to hero research/event mechanics. A generic category page, resource page, and unrelated low-fit pages were not selected. No single result should be treated as proof for player-facing mechanics.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Regular event with a Hero Initiative theme that uses Heroic Experience and Hero Fragments to improve Heroes and earn points; also includes an Age of Science research theme.
results.primary_user_job: Find which daily event cycles reward hero upgrades and research actions.
claims_to_verify: Exact point values for hero and research actions
Rotation schedule by day and Apocalypse Time

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page listing hero classes and the main stats/power inputs, useful for linking event tasks to hero progression.
results.primary_user_job: Understand hero types and power factors before cross-checking event rewards or upgrade tasks.

results.title: Event Center | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events, useful for locating event-specific mechanics and reward tabs.
results.primary_user_job: Navigate to event pages and compare their rules and reward structures.
claims_to_verify: Whether all events are daily or seasonal

search_records.search_notes: Search restricted to www.packsify.com returned no discoverable results for the provided query. No discovery leads found within the allowed domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No matching pages were indexed or accessible for the requested Packsify Last Z gear guide query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to mmediamreza.com and surfaced several Last Z-specific guide pages. Prioritized concrete gameplay/reference pages over the generic home page. No public claims marked ready.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for Shooter Camp with upgrade table, unlock requirements, training cap, and training speed details.
results.primary_user_job: Plan shooter troop training and upgrade priorities.

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for Assaulter Camp describing training cap, training speed, and power growth with level milestones.
results.primary_user_job: Plan assaulter troop training and building upgrades.

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for Laboratory research, upgrade value, and unlocking a second lab queue.
results.primary_user_job: Track research priorities and lab queue progression.
